brand.hero_body: From the fertile plains of Sirajgonj to markets across Asia — we manufacture and export premium sesame oil with the care and traceability that serious buyers expect.

locations.label: Head Office — Dhaka
locations.body: Commercial operations, buyer relations, export management

locations.label: Factory — Ullapara
locations.body: Oil crushing facility, seed processing, cleaning, drying, and quality laboratory

about_paragraphs: Shufola Multi Products Ltd is a specialist sesame oil manufacturer and exporter headquartered in Dhaka. Our entire operation is purpose-built around sesame — from procurement through processing to international shipment.

Our factory in Ullapara, Sirajgonj sits at the heart of one of Bangladesh's most fertile sesame-growing regions. With a port office in Chattogram, we maintain direct control over logistics, documentation, and quality at every stage.
Every batch is SGS-tested. Every shipment is fully documented. Every buyer gets a focused, expert partner.

products.name: Crude Sesame Oil
products.short: Crushed from carefully selected seeds. Deep golden color, rich natural aroma. Our core export product for refineries and food manufacturers.
product_detail_narrative: Crude sesame oil is the first pressing from our selected seeds at the Ullapara facility. We hold the cake separately for second-grade applications; the first-press fraction is what ships to international refineries and premium food manufacturers.
Every batch is tested by SGS Bangladesh for moisture, free fatty acid, acidity, and color before it leaves our warehouse. The certificate of analysis ships with the lot.
We work in full container loads (FCL) with flexitank as standard; drums and IBC totes available for smaller orders. LC-negotiation and complete export documentation handled in-house.

products.name: Refined Sesame Oil
products.short: Crystal-clear with a light, clean taste. Suitable for cooking, food processing, and consumer-grade products.

products.name: Brown Sesame Seeds
products.short: Double-skin variety. Cleaned and dried to optimal moisture levels. Versatile for oil extraction, bakery, and confectionery applications.

products.name: Black Sesame Seeds
products.short: Double-skin variety. Cleaned and dried to preserve quality and shelf life. Rich in nutrients, prized in East Asian cuisines and health food markets.

products.name: Yellow Sesame Seeds
products.short: Double-skin variety. Cleaned and dried for uniform quality. Mild flavor profile suited for bakery, confectionery, and tahini production.

products.name: White Mountain Seeds
products.short: Single-skin variety sourced from highland regions. Cleaned and dried. Smooth texture with a delicate nutty flavor for premium food applications.

products.name: Black Mountain Seeds
products.short: Single-skin variety from highland cultivation. Cleaned and dried. Distinctive flavor for specialty and traditional food products.

process.title: Seed Sourcing
process.body: Selected from trusted farms across the Sirajgonj sesame belt for premium raw material quality.

process.title: Cleaning & Drying
process.body: Multi-stage mechanical cleaning followed by drying to optimal moisture levels for quality preservation.

process.title: Oil Crushing
process.body: Selected seeds crushed to extract crude sesame oil, preserving natural aroma and nutrients.

process.title: Quality Testing
process.body: SGS-certified laboratory testing for acidity, moisture, color, and purity.

process.title: Pack & Ship
process.body: Packed in flexitank, drums, or PP oven bags. Full export documentation from LC to Bill of Lading.

export_capabilities.title: Documentation
export_capabilities.body: Bill of Lading, Certificate of Origin, Phytosanitary, Health Certificate, and all LC-required documents prepared in-house.

export_capabilities.title: Shipping
export_capabilities.body: Partnerships with major shipping lines. Flexitank for oil, standard containers for seeds. Direct access to Chattogram port.

export_capabilities.title: Banking & LC
export_capabilities.body: Established banking relationships. Expert LC negotiation, amendment handling, and compliance documentation.

export_capabilities.title: Quality Assurance
export_capabilities.body: Every shipment tested by SGS Bangladesh. Full compliance with buyer specifications and food safety standards.

export_capabilities.title: Flexible Packaging
export_capabilities.body: Flexitank, drums, and PP oven bags. Private labeling and custom packaging available on request.

export_capabilities.title: End-to-End Service
export_capabilities.body: From proforma invoice to final shipment — C&F coordination, freight booking, and regulatory compliance.

footer.description: Bangladesh's dedicated sesame oil manufacturer and exporter. Trusted by international buyers for consistent quality and reliable supply.
